title: About — home-page block introducing Marc
problem: The home page sells a HUMAN solo Québécois dev — the visitor needs to see who they're working with. About is the home-page introduction block: portrait + short bio + GitHub link. Portrait gracefully degrades to text-only if /marc.jpg ever 404s (onError handler hides the figure).
analysis: Renders DICT[lang].about copy. /marc.jpg is the portrait; hides the figure so a 404 doesn't render a broken-image icon. GITHUB_URL is hardcoded. CrossFeatureLink at the bottom routes to /parcours for more depth. Feature colour is HOME_SECTION_FEATURE['about'] = 'meta' (the backstage feature) — about-the-practice is meta-tinted.

decisions.decision: Portrait onError hides the figure instead of showing alt text
decisions.rationale: A broken image icon looks broken. Alt text on a hidden figure is gentler — the bio paragraph still reads. The cost is no portrait shown when 404'd; cheaper than rendering wrong.
decisions.recommendation: Keep the onError handler. The previous version showed a generic placeholder which AUDIT P3.18 corrected.

successCriteria:
- Portrait + bio + GitHub link render
- Portrait gracefully degrades on 404
- About section is meta-tinted (backstage feature colour)
- Bilingual at full parity
implementation: src/components/About.tsx — DICT[lang].about. . SectionEyebrow + HOME_FOLIOS for chrome.
userGuide: Edit copy via DICT.fr.about / DICT.en.about. Update portrait by replacing public/marc.jpg. Update GitHub URL via the GITHUB_URL constant.
knownLimitations: Portrait is a single asset; no responsive srcset
GitHub URL is hardcoded; no link to other socials (no Twitter, LinkedIn) by design — Marc's professional surface is the portal itself
Bio length is short by intent; if the practice ever wants a deeper About page, fork into /about

statusHistory.reason: Code-first doc co-located. onError graceful-degrade pattern stable since AUDIT P3.18 cleanup.
